recommendations.title: Cat Person
recommendations.overview: When Margot, a college sophomore, goes on a date with the older Robert, she finds that IRL Robert doesn’t live up to the Robert she has been flirting with over texts.

recommendations.title: Concussion
recommendations.overview: A dramatic thriller based on the incredible true David vs. Goliath story of American immigrant Dr. Bennet Omalu, the brilliant forensic neuropathologist who made the first discovery of CTE, a football-related brain trauma, in a pro player and fought

recommendations.title: The Stanford Prison Experiment
recommendations.overview: In 1971, Stanford's Professor Philip Zimbardo conducts a controversial psychology experiment in which college students pretend to be either prisoners or guards, but the proceedings soon get out of hand. Based on a true story.

recommendations.title: God's Not Dead
recommendations.overview: After he refuses to disavow his faith, a devout Christian student must prove the existence of God or else his college philosophy professor will fail him.

recommendations.title: Jerry Seinfeld: 23 Hours to Kill
recommendations.overview: Jerry Seinfeld takes the stage in New York and tackles talking vs. texting, bad buffets vs. so-called "great" restaurants and the magic of Pop Tarts.

recommendations.title: 12th Fail
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of IPS officer Manoj Kumar Sharma, 12th Fail sheds limelight on fearlessly embracing the idea of restarting the academic journey despite the setbacks and challenges and reclaiming one's destiny at a place where millions of stu

recommendations.title: Hachiko
recommendations.overview: The tragic, true story about Hachikō, an Akita dog who was loyal to his master, Professor Ueno, even after Ueno's death.

recommendations.title: Greater
recommendations.overview: The incredible true story of the greatest walk-on in the history of college football.

recommendations.title: The Good Neighbor
recommendations.overview: A nightmarish evening unfolds for neighbors David and Robert when they accidentally hit a woman on her bike and flee the scene. While David is increasingly plagued by feelings of guilt, Robert shows no remorse and becomes overbearing and possessive.

recommendations.title: War Dogs
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of two young men, David Packouz and Efraim Diveroli, who won a $300 million contract from the Pentagon to arm America's allies in Afghanistan.
